name: browser-image-compression-tools
description: Browser-based image compression examples for JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, target KB compression, resizing and image conversion.

scripts.check: node --check examples/compress-jpg.js && node --check examples/compress-png.js && node --check examples/compress-to-target-kb.js && node --check examples/resize-image.js && node --check examples/jpg-to-webp.js

author: ImagesCompression.com
